video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall near the quest board, a feminine healer in cream and mint robes with a satchel and an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a bow case; the healer presents a sealed quest parcel to the ranger with both hands, visible handoff motion, lively guild background, warm wood textures, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous guild hall shot; the androgynous ranger accepts the sealed parcel from the healer, both characters bow slightly in acknowledgment, the handoff completes clearly, warm anime RPG lighting, consistent character appearance and background, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The prompt describes a standard, non-sexual professional interaction between two RPG characters. No prohibited content, text, or watermarks included.

timeline_story.story_verb: completed a visible quest handoff with
timeline_story.selection_reason: The guild hall is buzzing with the urgent need for the relic's mana signature to open the sealed gate; Ari Starling provides the item to Ari Ironleaf.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Professional support during an urgent mission.
Gratitude for the essential relic provided for the expedition.
